design_philosophy.core_loop: Timing-based grappling system where players must learn wrestler movesets, read opponent patterns, and execute contextual holds/counter-holds at precise moments to build toward increasingly powerful moves.
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Strategic positioning and move sequencing: players must work up through weaker moves to condition opponents before unleashing powerful signature/finishing moves. Execution window timing creates moment-to-moment tension.
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Master a deep wrestling simulation featuring authentic international wrestling styles (lucha-libre, puroresu, strong-style, joshi, hardcore) and create dream matchups across promotions and eras.
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Fire Pro Wrestling explicitly rejects button-mashing arcade wrestling in favor of a timing-and-strategy-based grappling system. The series prioritizes wrestling authenticity and simulation depth over arcade accessibility, positioning itself as the 'thinking player's wrestling game.' Unlicensed design allows creative freedom to represent global wrestling styles without corporate constraints.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Match types feature flexible rule customization and variable opponent selection. Players can adjust match conditions and opponent difficulty through wrestler selection and match configuration.

progression.upgrade_system: Wrestler movesets and stats are customizable through roster selection and Edit Mode. Players build wrestlers with specific move pools and artificial intelligence behavior patterns.
progression.unlock_mechanism: Initial roster of unnamed wrestler likenesses representing real-life performers. Edit Mode allows creation of unlimited custom wrestlers with tailored move sets and CPU logic.
replayability_hooks: Dream matchups between wrestlers from different promotions and eras
Extensive match type variety (singles, tag teams, extreme hardcore variants like Landmine Death Match and Electric Barbed Wire Cage Match)
Detailed Edit Mode enables creation of realistic recreations of real wrestlers with unique behavioral AI
Multiple international wrestling style representations (WWE-style, lucha-libre, puroresu, strong-style, joshi, hardcore)

world_building_techniques: Wrestler roster representing unnamed likenesses of real-life international performers
Match type variety reflects authentic professional wrestling match formats across global promotions
Wrestler customization options (attire, moveset, behavior) allow players to construct personal narratives

faction_indicators: Wrestler style taxonomy: North American sports-entertainment vs. Mexican lucha-libre vs. Japanese puroresu (athletic junior-heavyweight, strong-style, joshi, hardcore)
danger_signals: Extreme match types with hardcore elements (Electric Barbed Wire Cage Match, Landmine Death Match)

sources_used: wikipedia: Fire Pro Wrestling series overview and features
